user.title: Connect to Väinö
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Väinö Pi.

confirm.title: Väinö Discovered
confirm.description: A Väinö device was found at `{host}`. Do you want to add it?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Väinö at that address. Check the host and ensure the Pi is powered on.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check your HA logs.

abort.already_configured: This Väinö device is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the discovered Väinö device.
